---
title: "Ablation Study"
---

## What — Experiment Identity

- **Experiment**: quantify each component's individual contribution by systematic removal from the full model

## Why — Experiment Purpose

- **Claim addressed**: Claim 2 — Component X is necessary for the observed gain

```{dot}
//| label: fig-ablation-design
//| fig-cap: "Ablation: metric delta per removed component confirms necessity"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 3.2
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    Full [label="Full Model", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    WoA [label="w/o Comp A"]
    WoB [label="w/o Comp B"]
    WoC [label="w/o Comp C"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    Delta [label="Δ Metric", fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
    Rank  [label="Contribution\nRanking", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }

  Full -> WoA  Full -> WoB  Full -> WoC
  WoA  -> Delta  WoB -> Delta  WoC -> Delta
  Delta -> Rank
}
```

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Datasets</strong></summary>

- **Dataset**: [same as main experiment]
- **Split**: [identical to main experiment — ensures comparable results]

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Baselines (Ablation Variants)</strong></summary>

| Configuration | What is removed | Expected effect |
|--------------|----------------|-----------------|
| Full model | nothing (reference) | best performance |
| w/o Component A | [describe] | [expected metric drop] |
| w/o Component B | [describe] | [expected metric drop] |
| w/o Component C | [describe] | [expected metric drop] |
| Minimal (baseline) | all components | lower bound |

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Evaluation Metrics</strong></summary>

| Metric | What it measures | Why chosen |
|--------|-----------------|------------|
| [Metric A] | [same as main] | [consistency with main result] |
| Δ vs. Full | metric drop when component removed | [directly measures contribution] |

- Protocol: remove one component at a time; measure metric drop relative to full model

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Run Commands</strong></summary>

```bash
# Full model (reference)
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method>

# Without Component A
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> method.use_comp_a=false

# Without Component B
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> method.use_comp_b=false

# Without Component C (if applicable)
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> method.use_comp_c=false
```

</details>

---

## Results

> Fill in after running. Report metric delta relative to the full model.

| Configuration | Metric A | Metric B | Δ vs. Full |
|--------------|----------|----------|------------|
| Full model | — | — | 0.0 |
| w/o Component A | — | — | — |
| w/o Component B | — | — | — |
| w/o Component C | — | — | — |
| Minimal (baseline) | — | — | — |

---

## Analysis

<details>
<summary><strong>Contribution Ranking</strong></summary>

- **Most important component**: [component name] — removing it drops [metric] by [Δ]
- **Least important component**: [component name] — safely removable if compute is constrained

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>Interaction Effects</strong></summary>

- **A + B synergy**: combining A and B yields [more / less] than the sum of individual contributions
- **Redundancy**: [components X and Y] partially overlap in function
- **Order sensitivity**: [if applicable] initialisation order of components affects convergence

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>Claim Status</strong></summary>

- **Claim 2 status**: ⬜ Pending — will be updated after runs complete
- **Key finding**: [placeholder — state the main insight from this ablation]
- **Action**: [if a component proves unnecessary, note whether to remove from final model]

</details>
